title: Frisbee Flying Saucers Snack, 625g, Assorted Flavors
features: Lightweight fun: At just 625g, toss these frisbee-shaped flying saucers in the air for hours of active play and entertainment.
All-natural ingredients: Made from just wheat maize Starch and Sugar, each disc is baked to crunchy perfection with artificial colors, flavors or preservatives.
Endless snacking: Whether as an on-the-go snack or afternoon movie companion, these saucers satisfy snack attacks while adding smiles.
Unique aerodynamic shape: The curved edges and lightweight construction allow for spinning, gliding and catching action like no other snack.
Mess-free enjoyment: Unlike chips or crackers, the fully-enclosed design means no crumbs - just crispy, clean fun from start to finish!
description: Product description The CD Frisia Astra Flying Saucers Drum is sure to be a hit at any party or event. Weighing in at a generous 625 grams, this drum is packed with flavor that will have everyone wanting more. With its fun flying saucer shape and vibrant red color, it's impossible to miss on any table. The all-natural ingredients like maize, starch and sugar give it a light, crispy texture that's enjoyable for snacking. Whether you're enjoying it on its own or with dips, this unique drum provides big fun in a compact package. It stores well for up to one month keeping its crunch. With low moisture content, it stays fresh without preservatives. Give your get together an intergalactic twist with the CD Frisia Astra Flying Saucers Drum - guaranteed to be a crowdpleaser! Ingredients SUGAR MAIZE WATER DEXTROSE ,Flavourings, Colours: E100, E132, E162. Acid (E334) ,Acidity regulator (E500)
